hypothesis: Integrating a dedicated 3D conformer modality encoded as standardized Cartesian coordinates and dihedral angles into STR-Bamba426M's multimodal vocabulary will yield a statistically significant reduction in error for conformer-dependent properties (e.g., relative conformer energies, barrier heights, and dipole moments) across small molecules and polymers and will improve zero-shot generalization to unseen chemistries compared to using only 2D textual representations.
